notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from dgfp-5-rep2 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Single predicate isBusyDelayCall matches mdelay() call sites (no argument threshold); sleepable/atomic context filters inlined in assembly where-clause via caller-name heuristics. final.ql compiles and fires 4x on POC (buggy + tp1/tp2/tp3 sleepable-context callers), silent on _fixed/tn* (use usleep_range/msleep) and fp1/fp2/fp3 (atomic-context callers: irq_handler/locked/nmi).
